title: phanera flava
intro: Phanera flava, also known as the golden tree or yellow rattan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phanera flava are attributed to its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions, such as high blood pressure and cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Phanera flava include decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed as teas or added to food products to harness its medicinal properties.
